text: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN): A central sector scheme providing income support to all landholding farmer families in India. Eligibility: All landholding farmer families are eligible (subject to certain exclusion criteria like institutional landholders, professionals, and high-income earners). Benefits: Financial benefit of ₹6,000 per year is provided in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each, every four months, directly into the bank accounts of the beneficiaries.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

text: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY): Provides comprehensive insurance cover against crop failure, helping in stabilizing the income of the farmers. Eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing the notified crops in the notified areas are eligible. Benefits: Low premium rates (2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial/horticultural crops). Covers yield losses, prevented sowing, and post-harvest losses due to localized calamities.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

text: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY): The world's largest health insurance/assurance scheme fully financed by the government. Eligibility: Vulnerable families as per SECC 2011 data (Rural and Urban). No limit on family size, age, or gender. Benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Covers over 1,300 medical procedures, including pre and post-hospitalization expenses.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

text: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP): A campaign to provide quality medicines at affordable prices to the masses through special outlets (Jan Aushadhi Kendras). Eligibility: Open to all citizens. Anyone can purchase medicines from Jan Aushadhi Kendras. Benefits: Generic medicines available at 50% to 90% cheaper rates than branded medicines in the open market. Ensures access to quality healthcare without high costs.
